newDirectories.name: Documentation platforms
newDirectories.description: Hosted docs and developer-documentation platforms for product and API docs.
newDirectories.heroCopy: Authoring DX, API reference quality, customization, ecosystem, and cost decide whether docs feel alive or stale.

aspects.label: Cost
aspects.description: Pricing relative to what you get (5 = great deal).

aspects.label: Developer experience
aspects.description: Authoring, docs-as-code or visual editing, and preview quality.

aspects.label: Ecosystem
aspects.description: Integrations, framework support, themes, and community depth.

aspects.label: API reference
aspects.description: OpenAPI/AsyncAPI import and interactive reference quality.

aspects.label: Customization
aspects.description: Theming, branding, layout control, and white-labeling.

items.name: Mintlify
items.description: Developer documentation platform combining MDX docs-as-code with a web editor and auto-generated interactive API references.

items.name: GitBook
items.description: Documentation platform pairing a Git-based workflow with a visual editor, AI assistant, and enterprise access controls.

items.name: ReadMe
items.description: Hosted API documentation platform with an interactive API explorer, usage metrics, and developer hub features.

items.name: Fern
items.description: API platform that generates SDKs and a hosted documentation site from an OpenAPI or Fern Definition spec.

items.name: Redocly
items.description: API documentation and governance platform built around OpenAPI with the open-source Redoc reference renderer.

items.name: Stoplight
items.description: API design and documentation platform with visual OpenAPI editing, mocking, and a hosted developer portal.

items.name: Bump.sh
items.description: Hosted API documentation and changelog service that renders OpenAPI and AsyncAPI specs with diff tracking.

items.name: Nextra
items.description: Next.js-based static site generator for docs and blogs with MDX, themes, and full-text search.

items.name: Starlight
items.description: Astro's official documentation theme delivering fast, accessible, content-focused docs sites out of the box.

items.name: Docusaurus
items.description: Meta's open-source React documentation framework powering thousands of self-hosted developer docs sites.

items.name: VitePress
items.description: Vite and Vue-powered static site generator optimized for fast, lightweight technical documentation.

items.name: Read the Docs
items.description: Open-source documentation hosting that builds and versions Sphinx and MkDocs sites straight from a repository.

items.name: Material for MkDocs
items.description: Popular MkDocs theme that turns Markdown into a polished, searchable static documentation site.

items.name: Document360
items.description: Knowledge base and documentation platform aimed at help centers, product docs, and internal wikis.

items.name: Archbee
items.description: Documentation platform for product and developer docs with block-based editing and API reference support.

items.name: Slab
items.description: Modern team knowledge base and internal wiki focused on a clean writing experience and organization.

newDirectories.name: Maps and geolocation
newDirectories.description: Mapping, geocoding, routing, and IP-geolocation APIs for location-aware apps.
newDirectories.heroCopy: Data coverage, feature breadth, cost, DX, and ecosystem decide whether location features feel precise or patchy.

aspects.label: Cost
aspects.description: Pricing and free-tier generosity relative to request volume.

aspects.label: Developer experience
aspects.description: SDKs, docs, map libraries, and ease of integration.

aspects.label: Ecosystem
aspects.description: Plugins, framework bindings, and third-party tooling.

aspects.label: Data coverage
aspects.description: Global map detail, accuracy, and freshness of location data.

aspects.label: Feature breadth
aspects.description: Maps, geocoding, routing, places, traffic, and geofencing scope.

items.name: Google Maps Platform
items.description: Google's comprehensive location suite covering maps, geocoding, routing, places, and street-level imagery.

items.name: Mapbox
items.description: Developer-first mapping platform known for customizable vector maps, navigation, and rich geospatial SDKs.

items.name: HERE Technologies
items.description: Enterprise location platform offering high-accuracy maps, routing, and fleet and logistics services.

items.name: TomTom
items.description: Location technology company providing maps, real-time traffic-aware routing, and navigation APIs.

items.name: Azure Maps
items.description: Microsoft's geospatial service for maps, search, routing, and weather integrated into the Azure ecosystem.

items.name: Esri ArcGIS
items.description: Industry-standard GIS platform with location services, spatial analytics, and basemaps for professional mapping.

items.name: MapTiler
items.description: Mapping platform offering customizable vector tiles, a visual style editor, and geocoding at competitive prices.

items.name: Stadia Maps
items.description: Privacy-focused mapping API serving open-data map tiles, geocoding, and routing built on OpenStreetMap.

items.name: Protomaps
items.description: Open-source mapping stack that serves an entire basemap from a single static file on cheap object storage.

items.name: Radar
items.description: Location platform for geofencing, trip tracking, and address autocomplete built on OpenStreetMap data.

items.name: Geoapify
items.description: Location API service for geocoding, routing, maps, and places with a generous free tier.

items.name: LocationIQ
items.description: Affordable geocoding, reverse geocoding, autocomplete, and routing API built on open geodata.

items.name: Geocodio
items.description: US and Canada-focused bulk geocoding API with data appends like congressional districts and timezones.

items.name: IPinfo
items.description: IP address geolocation API providing location, ASN, carrier, and privacy-detection data.

items.name: MaxMind GeoIP
items.description: Long-running IP intelligence provider offering GeoIP2 geolocation databases and a lookup web service.

items.name: ipgeolocation.io
items.description: IP geolocation, timezone, and astronomy API with a broad free tier for lightweight lookups.

newDirectories.name: Video infrastructure
newDirectories.description: Video streaming, encoding, and realtime-video infrastructure for apps and platforms.
newDirectories.heroCopy: Latency, scalability, cost, DX, and ecosystem separate buttery playback from buffering.

aspects.label: Cost
aspects.description: Pricing relative to delivered minutes, storage, and participants.

aspects.label: Developer experience
aspects.description: SDKs, APIs, dashboards, and integration ergonomics.

aspects.label: Ecosystem
aspects.description: Client SDKs, platform coverage, and third-party integrations.

aspects.label: Latency
aspects.description: Glass-to-glass delay for live and realtime video.

aspects.label: Scalability
aspects.description: Headroom for concurrent viewers, rooms, and global delivery.

items.name: Mux
items.description: Developer-focused video API for on-demand and live streaming with built-in playback performance analytics.

items.name: Cloudflare Stream
items.description: Cloudflare's video service for storing, encoding, and delivering on-demand and live video over its global network.

items.name: api.video
items.description: API-first platform for uploading, encoding, hosting, and live-streaming video with delivery analytics.

items.name: Bitmovin
items.description: Enterprise video encoding, player, and analytics suite tuned for high-quality adaptive streaming.

items.name: Wowza
items.description: Veteran streaming provider offering cloud APIs and on-premise media server software for live and VOD.

items.name: Livepeer
items.description: Decentralized video transcoding and streaming network offering low-cost compute for live and on-demand video.

items.name: FastPix
items.description: Cloud-native, API-first video platform to ingest, encode, stream, and analyze on-demand and live video.

items.name: LiveKit Cloud
items.description: Managed hosting for the open-source LiveKit WebRTC stack powering realtime audio, video, and AI agents.

items.name: Daily
items.description: WebRTC platform offering prebuilt and customizable APIs for embedding realtime video and audio calls.

items.name: Agora
items.description: Realtime engagement platform with global low-latency SDKs for voice, video, and interactive live streaming.

items.name: 100ms
items.description: Live video infrastructure with prebuilt UI components and SDKs for video conferencing and interactive streaming.

items.name: Vonage Video API
items.description: WebRTC video API (formerly OpenTok/TokBox) for embedding multiparty realtime video into applications.

items.name: ZEGOCLOUD
items.description: Realtime voice, video, and live-streaming SDK provider with broad platform coverage and prebuilt UI kits.

items.name: Dyte
items.description: Realtime video and voice SDK offering customizable prebuilt UI for embedding meetings and live experiences.

items.name: Whereby Embedded
items.description: Embeddable WebRTC video meetings API that drops realtime video into apps with minimal code.

items.name: mediasoup
items.description: Open-source WebRTC SFU library for Node.js used to build custom low-latency realtime video servers.

newDirectories.name: AI inference platforms
newDirectories.description: Model hosting, serverless-GPU, and inference platforms for running AI workloads.
newDirectories.heroCopy: Cold start, model catalog, cost, DX, and ecosystem decide whether deploying a model is a command or a project.

aspects.label: Cost
aspects.description: GPU and per-call pricing relative to performance.

aspects.label: Developer experience
aspects.description: SDKs, deploy workflow, local iteration, and docs.

aspects.label: Ecosystem
aspects.description: Integrations, framework support, and community examples.

aspects.label: Cold start
aspects.description: How fast a scaled-to-zero model serves its first request.

aspects.label: Model catalog
aspects.description: Breadth of ready-to-run hosted models and fine-tuning options.

items.name: Replicate
items.description: Platform for running and deploying open-source machine-learning models via API with a large community model library.

items.name: Modal
items.description: Serverless cloud platform that runs Python functions and AI workloads on GPUs with per-second billing.

items.name: Baseten
items.description: Inference platform for deploying and autoscaling ML models in production, built around the open-source Truss tool.

items.name: RunPod
items.description: Cloud GPU platform offering on-demand pods and serverless endpoints with fast cold starts for AI inference.

items.name: Together AI Inference
items.description: Inference cloud serving 100-plus open-weight models behind an OpenAI-compatible API with dedicated endpoints and fine-tuning.

items.name: Fireworks AI Inference
items.description: Fast inference platform for open and proprietary models with an OpenAI-compatible API, fine-tuning, and FireAttention serving.

items.name: fal
items.description: Generative-media inference platform serving fast hosted image, video, and audio models on its own GPU runtime.

items.name: Beam
items.description: Serverless GPU platform for running Python AI workloads and functions with fast cold starts and per-second billing.

items.name: Cerebrium
items.description: Serverless AI infrastructure platform for deploying ML models and apps on GPUs with minimal configuration.

items.name: Hugging Face Inference Endpoints
items.description: Managed service for deploying models from the Hugging Face Hub onto dedicated autoscaling infrastructure.

items.name: Anyscale
items.description: Ray-based platform from the creators of Ray for scaling AI training and inference workloads in production.

items.name: DeepInfra
items.description: Low-cost inference API serving popular open-weight models on a pay-per-token basis with simple deployment.

items.name: Novita AI
items.description: GPU cloud and model-inference API offering serverless endpoints and on-demand instances for open models.

items.name: Inferless
items.description: Serverless GPU inference platform focused on fast cold starts and autoscaling for custom ML models.

items.name: Lambda Inference
items.description: Inference API from GPU cloud provider Lambda serving open-weight models at low per-token pricing.

items.name: Sieve
items.description: Inference platform for building and deploying AI video, audio, and multimodal pipelines via composable APIs.
